# @agent-os/backend-node-postgres Public API

Status: Backend package. Public exports are limited to the Node/Postgres backend interpreter and backend-specific configuration types.

## Public exports

- `.:NodePostgresBackend`
- `.:NodePostgresBackendOptions`
- `.:NodePostgresEventSubscription`
- `.:FactOwnerRef`
- `.:nodePostgresRuntimeIdentity`
- `.:nodePostgresProjectionKey`

## Experimental exports

None.

## Deprecated exports

None.

## Internal-only exports

Any package file or symbol not listed above. Test harness exports are internal.
